title: UPDATE does not work with DECLEAREd TABLE in FUNCTION
poc: CREATE FUNCTION MyFunc1() RETURNS INT BEGIN DECLARE t TABLE (i INT); UPDATE t SET i = 0; RETURN 1; END;
key_bug_features: UPDATE on DECLAREd TABLE in FUNCTION fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE FUNCTION UpdateTest() RETURNS INT BEGIN DECLARE temp_table TABLE (id INT, value VARCHAR(50));
UPDATE temp_table SET value = 'new_value' WHERE id = 1;
